scopeContract.rule: Every M39 queue row must be implemented or mapped-consumed exactly once.
scopeContract.runtimeBoundary: Filming scene selections and temporary calculation values remain in GameSession.shooting. Confirmed filming results are committed to economy, people, body, work.filmingByCharacterId, and work.filmingProgressFlags.

rows.runtimeConsumerId: calculateShootingResult and buildSceneTemporaryValues replace AV_POINTCALC calculation source

rows.sourcePath: original-game/ERB/システム関係/ビデオ周り/VIDEO.ERH
rows.runtimeConsumerId: videoSalesTotal, work.filmingByCharacterId, and work.filmingProgressFlags replace VIDEO.ERH video sales state
